creator: rometravelers
caption:
Golden sunsets over the Colosseum… summer in Rome never looked this good by @ruanlage 🌅✨Send this to your favorite traveling partner! 😍

💡 Summer brings long, sunny days perfect for exploring iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, and Pantheon.

transcription.text: ♪ I'm in a bad girl good mood wearing my gold hoops, lining my lips right now in the rear view. Baby, don't even play. When you look at me like that in your cowboy hat. ♪
